strengths: Exceeds the minimum requirement of 15 years of software engineering experience, backed by a Computer Science degree from MIT.
Strong entrepreneurial background as a founder (GISCollective) and a proven ability to inspire others through workshops and technical talks.
Hands-on builder fluency with cloud technologies (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) and recent practical exposure to AI-agent infrastructure.
concerns: Lacks the preferred advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in an AI-related field and deep, recognized, long-term expertise in AI/ML strategy.
Experience is primarily at the Senior and Staff levels, lacking clear evidence of operating as a Director-level individual contributor.
No demonstrated history of advising strategic enterprise customers and partners on cutting-edge cloud and AI technology adoption.
response.justification: Bogdan is a highly capable software craftsman with over 15 years of experience, a strong educational background, and a commendable history of community engagement and entrepreneurial projects. However, this role requires a Director-level Principal Engineer with deeply recognized expertise in AI platform strategy and executive-level customer advisory experience. His profile leans heavily toward hands-on web, backend, and infrastructure development at the Staff level, with only very recent exposure to AI tooling, making him an under-leveled fit for this highly specialized strategic position.
